name: Tab Complete
desc: Server responds to C14PacketTabComplete with a list of matching commands/player names.

implementation.overview: S3A responds to tab-complete requests with matching commands/player names. No module in the examined client sources (500+ folders) directly targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S3APacketTabComplete)
modules.purpose: Server sends S3APacketTabComplete to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
